Designed & developed by Seid Endris

Our Services

Simple, efficient healthcare management solutions designed for medium-sized clinics to improve patient care and streamline operations.

Core Services

Drug Inventory Management

Manage your clinic's medication stock with automatic alerts for low stock and expiring medications.

  • Track medication quantities
  • Expiry date warnings
  • Prescription history
  • Stock reports

Patient Records Management

Store and access patient information, medical history, and treatment records in one place.

  • Patient information storage
  • Medical history tracking
  • Treatment records
  • Visit history

Medical Consultation Management

Record and track patient consultations, diagnoses, and treatment plans with detailed notes.

  • Consultation records
  • Diagnosis tracking
  • Treatment plans
  • Follow-up scheduling

Laboratory Results Tracking

Manage and track patient lab tests, results, and medical reports in organized files.

  • Lab test orders
  • Results storage
  • Report management
  • Result notifications

Prescription Management

Create, track, and manage patient prescriptions with dosage instructions and refill alerts.

  • Prescription creation
  • Dosage tracking
  • Refill reminders
  • Medication history

Patient Follow-up System

Schedule and track patient follow-ups, check-ups, and preventive care appointments.

  • Follow-up scheduling
  • Preventive care
  • Health reminders
  • Progress tracking

Ready to Get Started?

Join other clinics who trust Eman Clinic to manage their operations efficiently.
